summary: Fixed 5 critical bugs in CreateProfile modal: (1) Select.onChange was dead code — changed to pass onChange in create() options; (2) OS model select showed all models — now cascades from template when OS changes (OS values corrected from lowercase 'windows' to propercase 'Windows' matching JSON keys); (3) WebGL vendor change didn't update renderer — changed renderer from Input to Select, added _onVendorChange callback chain: Select onChange → HardwareTab._onVendorChange → CreateProfileModal._cascadeVendorChange; (4) OS key mismatch fixed — OS select values now 'Windows'/'macOS'/'Android' etc. matching JSON keys; (5) ComboBoxTag.setOptions now calls updateDropdown() to refresh open dropdown when options change. All 6 tabs getValues() properly wired. Build 0 errors.
current_status: CreateProfile modal fully functional: OS select correctly cascades model options, WebGL vendors/renderers, screen presets, hardware tiers, language options, and font options per OS. All controls wired with proper onChange callbacks. Build succeeded.
